lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
The vehicle is in mint condition. There is no wear on the interior or exterior. All systems are fully functional. The vehicle is in like-new condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor signs of wear from normal use. All mechanical systems are fully operational and have been regularly maintained.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and restoration fans! This car is ready for a complete transformation. While it's currently in poor condition and needs significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it's the perfect blank canvas for someone looking to take on a rewarding project!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained by its previous owners. Mechanically, it is sound; the engine starts reliably, and the transmission shifts smoothly through all gears. The exterior is clean and retains a strong finish, though upon close inspection, you will find a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and a couple of light surface scratches near the trunk lid. The interior has been kept very clean and is free of any smoke or pet odors, with only slight wear visible on the driver’s seat side bolster. All electronic features, including the infotainment system and climate control, are in full working order. This car offers a great balance of reliability and aesthetic appeal, making it a dependable choice for its next owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it does show signs of its age and mileage. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, but the suspension is beginning to feel a bit loose and will likely need attention in the near future. The exterior has several visible cosmetic issues, including a few small dents on the hood and noticeable paint chips on the front bumper. Inside, the cabin is functional but shows significant wear on the driver's seat and some light staining on the rear floor mats. While all essential features like the heater and headlights work perfectly, the infotainment screen has a few dead pixels. This is a transparent offering for someone looking for a functional vehicle at a reasonable price point.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards. With its flawless exterior finish and a cabin that retains its original factory luster, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class. We invite discerning buyers to acquire a peerless example of engineering excellence.

Hey there! Are you ready for your dream ride? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is stunning! This beauty is in total mint condition—it’s been babied since day one and honestly feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is a collector-grade E92 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. The S65 4.0L V8 remains a high-revving masterpiece, reaching its 8,400 RPM redline with surgical precision via individual throttle bodies. This specimen features the M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for optimized chassis dynamics. Mechanical integrity is paramount; preventative rod bearing replacement utilizing BE bearings and ARP bolts has been performed, alongside a fresh throttle actuator service. The subframe is pristine with zero stress fractures. Finished in flawless paint with no rock chips and featuring an interior with zero bolster wear, this is a turn-key example for the purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title in hand.

This vehicle is a pristine example of automotive excellence, maintained to a standard rarely seen on the secondary market. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero swirl marks, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather seats are supple without a single crease, and the dash is completely free of sun damage or wear. Mechanically, the car is flawless, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a full paper trail included. It drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line—tight suspension, responsive steering, and a whisper-quiet engine. This is a collector-grade car for a buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

Presented for the discerning collector, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained in absolute showroom condition, every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an example of unparalleled mechanical integrity and aesthetic perfection.

Presenting an exceptional acquisition for the discerning motorist: a vehicle preserved in peerless, showroom condition. This specimen exhibits an unblemished aesthetic and mechanical integrity that mirrors its original delivery state. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. We invite you to experience a standard of automotive excellence that transcends the typical pre-owned market.

Hey there! You've seriously gotta see this beauty in person! 🚗 I have absolutely babied this car since the day I got it, and it honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s in pristine, flawless condition—not a single scratch, dent, or smudge to be found. It drives like an absolute dream and the interior still has that fresh feel. I'm looking for a great new home for it, and I promise you won't find one cleaner than this! Drop me a message if you're interested!
Offered is a museum-grade example of a late-model sports coupe, featuring a venerable 3.6L flat-six powerplant equipped with VarioCam
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records available. Title in hand.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with no imperfections, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled environment under a soft cover. Inside, the interior is pristine; the high-grade leather remains supple with zero signs of wear, and the cabin still retains its original new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the premium sound system to the advanced navigation, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians—full documentation included. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. This is a rare opportunity to own a perfectly preserved example that drives exactly as it did on day one.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in pristine showroom condition. Every detail reflects a standard of care that preserves its original aesthetic and mechanical integrity. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unparalleled quality, suited for the most discerning collector. Its flawless presentation and documented history ensure a driving experience indistinguishable from its debut.

We are pleased to present this superlative specimen, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine asset, characterized by uncompromising mechanical integrity and a flawless aesthetic profile. For the discerning enthusiast, this offering stands as a benchmark of its class.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and it is in seriously stunning, mint condition! It’s been pampered since day one—garage-kept and meticulously detailed. You won’t find a mark on this beauty. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!

Offered is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. This specimen retains factory-correct subframe integrity and has received a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul. The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp, tactile engagement, paired with a variable M differential lock for precise torque vectoring. The chassis dynamics remain exceptionally taut, benefiting from original-spec bushings and Sachs dampers. With zero evidence of thermal cycling fatigue or underbody oxidation, this is a concours
Mint condition. Low mileage. No mechanical or cosmetic defects. Single owner. Garage kept.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, maintained with obsessive attention to detail and preserved in showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with a professional ceramic coating that highlights the flawless factory paint—there are absolutely no stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is immaculate and remains smoke-free; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero creasing, and every electronic feature functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car is peerless. It has been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never seen inclement weather. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule by certified master technicians, and a complete, comprehensive binder of maintenance records accompanies the sale. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade masterpiece that looks, smells, and drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered.

We are pleased to present this superlative example of automotive excellence. Maintained in pristine, showroom condition, this vehicle exhibits no discernible wear and represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every aspect of this specimen reflects a commitment to uncompromising standards and meticulous preservation.

Presenting a vehicle of superlative quality, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This motorcar features a flawless exterior profile and an interior cabin preserved in pristine condition. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering the most discerning buyer an unparalleled ownership opportunity. This is a rare acquisition for those who demand excellence without compromise.

Hey there! You have got to see this beauty – it's basically brand new and has been pampered like a member of the family! It’s in absolutely stunning, mint condition with that fresh-off-the-lot feel inside and out. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for perfection without the showroom price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you'll fall in love!
Offered is a pristine E46 M3, a true analog masterpiece for the discerning collector. Powered by the high-revving S54 3.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-condition masterpiece. Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep-gloss finish without a single swirl mark or stone chip. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition, featuring supple, unblemished leather and that elusive new-car scent. Every electronic component functions flawlessly, and the engine bay is immaculate. This vehicle comes with a complete, documented service history and has been driven sparingly, ensuring it performs with the same precision and smoothness as the day it was first delivered. This is a rare opportunity to own a true time-capsule vehicle that satisfies even the most discerning collector.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of the highest caliber. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserving its original showroom luster and mechanical integrity. It represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition. Every surface and component reflects a commitment to uncompromising excellence, ensuring a driving experience that is as refined as it is reliable.
